expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with multiple user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Notification Center",
  "branchName": "notification-center",
  "description": "Build persistent notification center with unread indicators, filtering, and clear-read controls.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Persist notification read state",
      "description": "As a user, I want read state saved so that notification state persists across sessions.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Store per-user notification read state and read timestamp in persistent storage",
        "Existing notifications default to unread where read state is absent",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/*notification-read-state*",
        "src/db/schema/notifications.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add backend notification list and unread-count query",
      "description": "As a user, I want notification data and unread counts so that the interface can show current state.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Query returns notifications for current user with read state ordered newest first",
        "Query returns unread count for current user",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/notifications/query*",
        "src/api/notifications/*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Implement mark read and mark unread actions",
      "description": "As a user, I want to mark notifications read or unread so that I can manage my unread queue.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Provide action to toggle read state for a user-owned notification",
        "Marking read sets read timestamp and marking unread clears read timestamp",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/notifications/updateReadState*",
        "src/api/notifications/*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Show unread badge and notification list surface",
      "description": "As a user, I want unread badge and notification list UI so that I can see and open notifications.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Navigation or header shows unread badge count from notification query",
        "Notification center list shows notifications with read/unread visual state",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/notifications/NotificationBadge.*",
        "src/components/notifications/NotificationCenterPanel.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Filter notification list by read state",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter notifications by read state so that I can focus on unread or read items.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification center offers All, Unread, and Read filters",
        "Selected filter updates displayed notifications accordingly",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/notifications/NotificationFilters.*",
        "src/components/notifications/NotificationCenterPanel.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Clear all read notifications",
      "description": "As a user, I want to clear all read notifications so that the list stays focused on pending items.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Provide action that clears read notifications for current user only",
        "After clear action, notification list and unread badge refresh correctly",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/notifications/clearRead*",
        "src/components/notifications/ClearReadButton.*",
        "src/components/notifications/NotificationCenterPanel.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover persistence, badge or list UI, read-state updates, filtering, and clearing read notifications.
